## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff call between Homebase and GrowthX to discuss AI-powered content and SEO strategy collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Homebase aims to drive new active accounts (2D30s) and increase sign-ups, especially for owners/managers (OAMs)](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Current content process relies heavily on agencies; opportunity to optimize with AI and in-house resources](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Key focus areas: programmatic SEO, labor law content, payroll acquisition, and improving content workflow efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide dedicated support (Sadira) and AI-powered tools to augment existing processes](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)

## Topics

### Team Introductions and Background

  - [Participants from Homebase: Kyle (monetization team), Kerry (content marketing lead), Niraj, Josh, Sachin](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)
  - [GrowthX team: Marcel Santilli (extensive content/SEO background), Sadira Sittampalam (AI/content specialist)](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Marcel shared experiences building successful content hubs (e.g., secretintelligence.com, techbeacon.com)](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)

### Homebase Metrics and Goals

  - [North Star metric: 2D30s (2 employee actions on 2 different days over 30 days)](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=2581.0)
  - [Leading indicators: OAM sign-ups, 1D1 (1 employee action within 24 hours)](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=2681.0)
  - [SEO signups trending upward, but facing challenges with brand traffic cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=2419.0)
  - [Non-brand organic traffic growth of 150%+ year-over-year](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=2429.0)
  - [Opportunity to diversify beyond time clock and scheduling keywords](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=2437.0)

### Current Content Production Process

  - [Keyword research and opportunity finding](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=5552.0)
  - [Agency-driven content creation (briefs, writing, uploading)](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=5552.0)
  - [In-house review and editing](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=5552.0)
  - [Publishing cadence of 10-15 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=5552.0)
  - [Challenges with version control and content repository management](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6213.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization Opportunities

  - [Leverage AI for content ideation, briefing, and quality checks](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6079.0)
  - [Improve internal linking and content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6079.0)
  - [Explore programmatic SEO for labor law and industry-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6079.0)
  - [Develop a more robust content distribution strategy (e.g., newsletters)](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6079.0)
  - [Optimize the editing process to reduce repetitive tasks](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6097.0)

### AI Integration and Workflow Improvements

  - [GrowthX to provide AI-powered tools for content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Focus on augmenting human expertise rather than full automation](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Explore Airtable or similar tools for improved content workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6079.0)
  - [Implement version control and streamline the content refresh process](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6213.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule recurring sync meetings (Tuesdays at 10am ET, starting May 6th)](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6760.0)
  - [Kyle to add GrowthX team to Slack channel and finalize Airtable access](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6046.0)
  - [Kerry and Marcel to have a deeper dive session on content workflow](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6109.0)
  - [GrowthX to start building sample AI flows and showcasing potential improvements](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6125.0)
  - [Begin integrating Sadira into Homebase's content processes starting Monday](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Continue competitive research and ecosystem mapping](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=4884.0)
  - [Identify quick wins and implement initial AI-powered optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/uY71Chu7n93sZ-ncunrAYP5dfrozaXtE?tab=summary&timestamp=6079.0)
